title: alsine intricata
intro: Alsine intricata, also known as Creeping Saxifrage or Alsine, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Alsine intricata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
